steps.title: Find the perpendicular slope
steps.content:
Rewrite line $k$ in slope-intercept form.
$$x+y=0$$
$$y=-x$$
Line $k$ has slope $-1$, so line $j$ has slope $1$.

steps.title: Write line j
steps.content:
Line $j$ has slope $1$ and $y$-intercept $(0,5)$.
$$y=x+5$$
$$x-y=-5$$
The answer is D.
